MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. BECAUSE OF OVERFLOW FROM DEPARTMENT 403 THIS MATTER WAS ADDED TO CALENDAR THIS DAY IN DEPART
MENT 404 SO THAT THE PARTIES COULD SPEAK THEIR AGREEMENT ON THE RECORD. A COMPLETE AGREEMENT WAS READ ON THE RECORD. EACH PARTY WILL KEEP THE
PONDENT AND PETITIONER WILL RETURN ALL PORTIONS OF THAT COLLECTION THAT ARE ON THE LIST TO RESPONDENT.  AN EQUALIZING PAYMENT FOR THE INSURANCE
FOR JUNE, JULY, AND AUGUST. IN SEPTEMBER THE CHILD BEGINS PUBLIC SCHOOL WHICH SHOULD ELIMINATE THE NEED FOR DAY CARE. EACH WILL PAY HALF THE COST
S FROM SATURDAY AFTERNOON TO START OF SCHOOL ON WEDNESDAY. ON ALTERNATE WEEKS THE CHILD WILL HAVE DINNER WITH RESPONDENT AS PUT ON THE RECORD. EACH
RECORD. BONUS INCOME WILL BE DEALT WITH AS PUT ON THE RECORD. PARTIES HAVE NO AGREEMENT ON THE RETIREMENT PLANS. THE ISSUE OF THE RETIREMENT PLANS
ABIDE BY THE AGREEMENT AS STATED ON THE RECORD. RESPONDENT PUT THE JURISDICTIONAL FACTS ON THE RECORD AND JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION OF MARRIAGE WAS
